---
title: "Teaching & Outreach"
---

Sharing marine science with students, communities and the public is a passion of mine. Alongside my research I teach at university, communicate science online and in classrooms, and volunteer with various conservation NGOs.

## Teaching

I have tutored and demonstrated undergraduate courses at the University of Queensland since 2018, and teach into international study-abroad programs.

- **International Programs Tutor**, University of Queensland: University of California and Stanford University Study Abroad Programs.
- **Demonstrator**: *Biostatistics &amp; Experimental Design* (BIOL2006), *Environment &amp; Society* (GEOS1100), *Zoology* (BIOL2204) and *Marine Science* (MARS1001).
- **Peer-Assisted Study Session &amp; Science Learning Centre Tutor**: university-funded academic tutoring and mentoring in biology, genetics, chemistry and statistics.

## Science communication &amp; outreach

- **Science communication**: I share marine science and life as a coral researcher on Instagram [\@biologist.byrne](https://www.instagram.com/biologist.byrne).
- **Wonder of Science**: led and supported STEM activities for school students across Queensland, including in regional and remote communities (an initiative of the Queensland Chief Scientist).
- **Curious Minds Coach**: mentored high-school students who are aspiring women in STEM.
- **Reef Check Australia Team Leader &amp; Ambassador**: represented reef science and conservation at markets, festivals and community events, and coordinated the *Coast to Coral* online seminar series.
- **UQ science engagement**: developed and delivered in-classroom and outdoor STEM experiences for high-school students, and university STEM and recruitment events.

## Professional service &amp; leadership

- **Secretary**, Society for Conservation Biology (South East Queensland) (2024-2026).
- **HDR Chair**, Centre for Marine Science Committee, UQ (2024-2026).
- **HDR Representative**, Australian Marine Sciences Association (South East Queensland branch) (2023-2025).
- Organising committee, **UQ–CNRS West Pacific Marine Biology Symposium** (2025).
- **Co-founder &amp; inaugural Vice President**, Marine Society UQ (2019).

## Selected awards &amp; funding

- **Holsworth Wildlife Research Endowment**, Ecological Society of Australia (2025-2027).
- **ELEVATE Boosting Women in STEM Scholarship** (2023–2026).
- **Global Change Scholars Program**, UQ &amp; CSIRO (2023–2024).
- **Lizard Island Research Station Award**, Australian Coral Reef Society (2022).
- **University Medal** for Outstanding Achievement, University of Queensland (2022).
- **Best Student Presentation**, Australian Coral Reef Society Conference (2022).
